Environmental Protection.summary: Wyden has consistently supported environmental legislation including climate action and renewable energy investments.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with environmental funding (Senate vote, August 2021)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Wyden chairs the Senate Finance Committee and has advocated for higher taxes on wealthy individuals and corporations.
voted_for: American Rescue Plan Act with tax credits for working families (Senate vote, March 2021)
Inflation Reduction Act with corporate minimum tax (Senate vote, August 2022)
voted_against: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (Senate vote, December 2017)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Wyden has co-sponsored federal cannabis reform legislation to deschedule marijuana.
voted_for: Cannabis Administration and Opportunity Act co-sponsor (Introduced July 2021)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Wyden has consistently voted to protect and expand reproductive health access.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)
Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, May 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Wyden has consistently supported LGBTQ+ rights legislation throughout his Senate tenure.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Merkley is a leading advocate for climate action and has introduced comprehensive environmental legislation.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)
100 by '50 Act to achieve 100% clean energy by 2050 (Introduced March 2019)

Police Accountability.summary: Merkley has co-sponsored police reform legislation and supported accountability measures.
voted_for: George Floyd Justice in Policing Act co-sponsor (Introduced 2020-2021)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Merkley supported bipartisan criminal justice reform efforts.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate vote, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Merkley has advocated for tax reform that increases burden on wealthy and corporations.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with corporate minimum tax (Senate vote, August 2022)
voted_against: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (Senate vote, December 2017)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Merkley has been a vocal supporter of federal cannabis legalization and banking access.
voted_for: SAFE Banking Act supporter (Multiple years)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Merkley has consistently voted to protect reproductive healthcare access.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)
Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, May 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Merkley has been a strong advocate for LGBTQ+ equality throughout his career.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)
Equality Act co-sponsor (Introduced 2021)

Environmental Protection.summary: Bonamici has consistently supported environmental protection and climate legislation.

Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (House vote, November 2021)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Bonamici has supported progressive tax policies and voted against Republican tax cuts.
voted_for: American Rescue Plan Act (House vote, March 2021)
voted_against: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (House vote, December 2017)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Bonamici has consistently voted to protect reproductive healthcare access.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (House vote, September 2021)
Women's Health Protection Act (House vote, July 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Bonamici has consistently supported LGBTQ+ rights legislation.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (House vote, July 2022)
Equality Act (House vote, February 2021)

Public School Funding.summary: Bonamici serves on the House Education Committee and advocates for increased education funding.
voted_for: American Rescue Plan Act with education funding (House vote, March 2021)

Environmental Protection.summary: Bentz has supported some conservation measures while opposing federal climate regulations.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (House vote, August 2022)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Bentz has opposed tax increases and supported lower taxes.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with corporate minimum tax (House vote, August 2022)
American Rescue Plan Act (House vote, March 2021)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Bentz has voted against federal protections for abortion access.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (House vote, September 2021)
Women's Health Protection Act (House vote, July 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Bentz has voted against federal LGBTQ+ rights legislation.
voted_against: Respect for Marriage Act (House vote, July 2022)
